title: grewia luteiflora
intro: Grewia luteiflora is a species of plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the yellow-fruited grewia. It is traditionally used in folk medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In traditional herbal preparations, Grewia luteiflora is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, but its use should be guided by a medical professional.
